title: Tibouchina moricandiana
taxonomy: Tibouchina moricandiana is classified in the family Melastomataceae and is a member of the genus Tibouchina. It belongs to the order Myrtales. The family Melastomataceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. This family is part of the clade Rosids, which includes many flowering plants. The species is native to South America.
